title: π₀.₅ (Pi0.5): Open-World Generalization Policy — LeRobot Integration
summary: This Hugging Face LeRobot documentation page covers the integration and finetuning of π₀.₅, Physical Intelligence's Vision-Language-Action model designed for open-world generalization. π₀.₅ advances over π₀ by co-training on heterogeneous data including multimodal web data, verbal instructions, cross-embodiment robot data, and approximately 400 hours of mobile manipulation demonstrations, enabling generalization across physical, semantic, and environmental levels. The LeRobot implementation achieves 97.5% average success on the LIBERO benchmark suite, matching or exceeding the original OpenPI reference results.
